sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100266" key="sunepikrate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-κρᾰτέω</orth>, Astrol., <sense id="n100266.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dominate together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:293:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">293.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
